name: Saudi Aramco SAES / SAMSS / GES — Engineering & Materials
name_ar: أرامكو السعودية SAES / SAMSS / GES — الهندسة والمواد
standard: Saudi Aramco Engineering Standards (SAES) + Saudi Aramco Materials System Specifications (SAMSS) + General Engineering Standards (GES)
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules for any Aramco-owned facility project (refineries, gas plants, NGL, GOSPs, RT&D, JCP, JCC, JV ventures). Verifies that BOQ positions and material submittals cite the correct SAES (engineering practices: SAES-A general / B safety / D static equipment / E rotating / G machinery / H instrumentation / J electrical / L piping / M civil-structural / N coatings / O communications / P offsite / Q tanks / S sanitary / T plant utilities / W welding / X painting / Z drawings), SAMSS (Materials System Specifications by family — line pipe 01, valves 005-068, fittings 035, etc.), and GES references (General Engineering Standards). Also enforces 9COM Schedule Q vendor pre-qualification, MIR (Material Inspection Report) workflow, IKTVA (In-Kingdom Total Value Add) score disclosure, and SAP-Ariba PR/PO references where applicable.
description_ar: تفعيل قواعد التحقق لمشاريع منشآت أرامكو — الإحالة إلى SAES و SAMSS و GES، ومتطلبات تأهيل المورد 9COM Schedule Q، وتقارير فحص المواد MIR، ودرجة إكتفاء IKTVA.
